overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant futuristic city district mixing traditional Japanese architecture with neon-lit cyberpunk elements. The character moves from an open plaza through crowded pedestrian areas, narrow alleys, and under massive overpass structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with traditional Japanese building and food vendors

events.description: character begins walking forward through the plaza following a pedestrian

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a blue shirt through a sunlit plaza with green tiled flooring

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking ahead of camera toward the plaza center
pedestrian in orange shirt walking across the path from right to left

entered.detail: two-story structure with curved roof, teal walls, and red stairs on the right side
large tree with green foliage in the middle of the plaza providing shade
distinctive green square tiles covering the entire plaza ground
blue and red neon light strips running along the building facade on the left
small food stall with colorful umbrella and vendor standing beside it

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit plaza with distinctive green tiled flooring. A traditional Japanese-style building with a curved roof stands prominently on the right, while a large tree occupies the center. The camera follows a pedestrian in a blue shirt walking ahead, passing food vendors and neon signage on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded pedestrian area under massive red overpass

events.description: moving under the large red overpass structure into a more enclosed space
passing close to pedestrians temporarily blocking the view of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dense crowd gathered under the red overpass structure

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind purple-lit food counter serving customers
pedestrian with blue hair and black vest walking in the same direction

entered.detail: massive red metal bridge or walkway overhead casting deep shadows below
food counter with bright purple LED lighting along the counter edge
row of traditional white Japanese lanterns with red patterns hanging above the stall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a semi-covered area beneath a massive red overpass structure. The space is crowded with pedestrians moving in the same direction. On the right, a food stall glows with purple neon lighting and traditional paper lanterns. The lighting becomes a mix of filtered sunlight and artificial neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with graffiti walls and temporary food stalls

events.description: entering darker narrow alley with graffiti-covered walls on the left
approaching the alley exit where bright sunlight becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit alleyway passing food stalls and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket and green pants walking away from camera down the alley

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint, tags, and street art
temporary market stall with canvas roof and vertical neon light strips
stacked cardboard boxes and debris near the right wall
yellow metal ladder attached to building facade leading upward

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow, enclosed alleyway with walls covered in colorful graffiti. The lighting becomes significantly darker and more artificial. Temporary food stalls with canvas canopies line the path, and cardboard boxes are stacked against the walls. The alley leads toward a bright exit where a cherry tree is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with cherry blossom tree and blue safety railings

events.description: emerging from dark alley into sunlit street with large cherry blossom tree
turning right onto street with blue railings passing residential buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large pink cherry blossom tree and continuing along a street with blue railings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead toward the cherry tree

entered.detail: large tree with pink blossoms planted in a concrete planter box
tall apartment building with teal window shutters and multiple satellite dishes
turquoise metal safety barriers running along the edge of the street
tall black pole with multiple lighting fixtures and attached signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark alley, the scene opens into a sunlit residential street dominated by a beautiful cherry blossom tree in full pink bloom. A tall residential tower with distinctive green shutters rises in the background. The camera turns right along a street lined with blue metal railings, passing under the shade of the tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass with Sector 7 signage leading to stairs

events.description: entering covered underpass area with large Sector 7 signage on concrete pillar
beginning to ascend wide concrete stairs at the end of the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past the Sector 7 pillar and ascending stairs at the end

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive teal structural column with red SECTOR 7 text and Japanese characters
concrete underside of elevated roadway with visible beams and pipes
wide staircase with red edges leading upward to the next level
large illuminated billboard displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a covered urban underpass dominated by a massive concrete pillar marked with SECTOR 7 in red lettering. The ceiling shows the underside of an elevated highway. Digital advertising screens illuminate the left side. The camera approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase, following a pedestrian upward toward the light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant city district that shifts from bright, open plazas into claustrophobic urban corridors before emerging into a residential sanctuary. It begins in a sunlit plaza with green tiled flooring and traditional Japanese architecture, following a pedestrian past food vendors and neon signs. As the camera moves forward, the environment transitions beneath a massive red overpass where filtered sunlight mixes with the purple glow of neon lanterns and crowded walkways. The scene then narrows into a dark, graffiti-covered alleyway lined with canvas stalls and cardboard boxes, before finally breaking out into a bright residential street dominated by a blooming pink cherry blossom tree and a tower with green shutters. The movement concludes as the camera turns right and enters a concrete underpass marked with red Sector 7 lettering, ascending a wide staircase toward the light.
